[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Zhanks''' was an officer of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Commander Zhanks was stationed on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to oversee the recruitment of pilots under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cilas Veckon|Veckon's]] aggressive push to expand the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] corps. His main office was located in the [[Kor Vella Hotel]].
